form.label: AI Discovery Inventory
form.description: Splunk-local view of the AI discovery and shadow-agent signals mirrored from the demo Grafana dashboards.

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | where ("$vendor$"="*" OR vendor="$vendor$") AND ("$category$"="*" OR category="$category$") AND ("$state$"="*" OR state="$state$") | stats dc(signal_id) as observed_signals
`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | where ("$vendor$"="*" OR vendor="$vendor$") AND ("$category$"="*" OR category="$category$") AND (state="new" OR state="changed") | stats count as new_signals
`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | where ("$vendor$"="*" OR vendor="$vendor$") AND ("$category$"="*" OR category="$category$") AND state="gone" | stats count as gone_signals
`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | where severity="ERROR" OR severity="CRITICAL" OR like(metric_name, "%errors%") | stats count as detector_errors
`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | where ("$vendor$"="*" OR vendor="$vendor$") AND ("$category$"="*" OR category="$category$") | timechart span=15m count by state limit=8 useother=t
`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | where ("$vendor$"="*" OR vendor="$vendor$") AND ("$state$"="*" OR state="$state$") | timechart span=15m count by category limit=8 useother=t

`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | where ("$vendor$"="*" OR vendor="$vendor$") AND ("$category$"="*" OR category="$category$") AND ("$state$"="*" OR state="$state$") | stats count as events dc(signal_id) as signals values(category) as categories values(state) as states values(detector) as detectors by vendor product | sort - signals - events | head 20
`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | stats count as events dc(signal_id) as signals values(vendor) as vendors values(product) as products by detector state | sort - events | head 20
`defenseclaw_demo_ai_discovery_events` | table timestamp scan_id signal_id state category vendor product detector severity message | sort - timestamp | head 50
